creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Try researching BadDrawable error. Over the years I've seen it happen due to graphics drivers, compositor and GUI toolkit interop (e.g., Flash plugin). While not a solution running Firefox under a Wayland compositor (e.g., sway) with MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND=1 in environ(7) should avoid X11 errors like BadDrawable.

Anyway, this looks like an issue with your environment rather than Firefox. Maybe find more users with the same issue to narrow down the environment.
